title: Duzzit Washing Machine Cleaner 250 Ml
features: DUZZIT WASHING MACHINE CLEANER: Maintain your washing machine keep it clean,
3 in 1 CLEANER: Cleans thoroughly, removes hidden dirt and detergent, removes limescale, removes bad odours, leaving a fresh clean machine. Treatment formulated to remove 100 Percentlimescale

PERFECTLY CLEAN: Duzzit Washing Machine Cleaner is a treatment designed to clean by eliminating detergent build up on the drum, pipes and seals. Removing limescale build up will help to maintain your washing machine whilst leaving it fresh and perfectly clean. Treatment will also freshen grime build up , leaving a residual odour. The cleaner will remove grime, leaving your machine smelling fresh and hygienically clean. Recommended to use every 3 months

PROTECT: Build-up of grime, detergent and limescale creates residual odour in appliances and over time damages them. Improve the life cycle of your machine by protecting the stainless-steel drum, pipes and seals with three monthly treatments of Duzzit Washing Machine Cleaner
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Single use. Size: 250ml
description: Product Description Duzzit Washing Machine Cleaner is a treatment designed to clean by eliminating detergent build up on the drum, pipes and seals. Build-up of grime, detergent and limescale creates residual odour in appliances and over time damages them, improve the life cycle of your machine by cleaning every 3 months. 250ml single use bottle Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactant. Also contains Perfume, Methylisothiazolinone, Methylchloroisothiazolinone
